title: Premier Housewares Arco Wall Clock - Hot Pink
features: Tell the time in style with our practical wall clock
Featuring a bright and colourful design that will hang beautifully in your kitchen or dining room
Care instructions: Wipe clean with a soft cloth
Height 30 cm x Width 30 cm x Depth 7 cm
description: Product Description Premier Housewares are one of the UK's leading suppliers and distributors of housewares and home lifestyle products to the retail trade. With an extensive portfolio that covers kitchenware, tabletop and bathroom accessories, as well as soft furnishing, decorative accessories, lighting and occasional furniture, our aim is to provide a complete solution to your housewares retailing needs by offering a comprehensive collection of co-ordinating products. Box Contains 1 x Premier Housewares Hot Pink Arco Wall Clock
